title: EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT - 211info
text: HARNEY COUNTY EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Educational Service Districts support school districts by providing services such as curriculum, instructional support and assessment, business operations, transportation, youth employment, printing, public relations, data processing, payroll, fingerprinting, network support, statewide computer networks, traffic safety education, construction management, preschool programs, homeless transportation, para-educator training, and special education. 25 Fairview Heights Loop Box 460 Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 573-2122 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 573-2122 Main phone Main phone (541) 573-2122 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: School Districts Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - FRONTIER EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY COUNTY EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
